channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Create a Kubernetes service account and assign permissions
item.description: When deploying applications to Kubernetes, it's important to ensure they have only the permissions they actually need. This is where ServiceAccounts and RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) come into...

item.title: 분산형 SSH 공격, fail2ban recidive로 막아낸 이야기
item.description: 분산형 SSH 공격, fail2ban recidive로 막아낸 이야기 언제부터인가 서버에 잊을만하면 SSH 경고 메일이 계속 들어왔습니다. 분명 fail2ban이 잘 돌고 있고, SSH 포트도 기본이 아닌 다른 걸로 바꿔뒀는데도 말이죠. 첫 아이 키우면서 뭘 해도 처음인 아빠 마음처럼, 서버 운영도 늘 새로운 문제투성이네요. 이번엔 잊을만하면...

item.title: n8n Airtable Node: Advanced Patterns for CRM Sync, Approval Flows, and Multi-Table Joins (Free Workflow JSON)
item.description: n8n Airtable Node: Advanced Patterns for CRM Sync, Approval Flows, and Multi-Table Joins (Free Workflow JSON) Airtable sits at a sweet spot between spreadsheet and database — flexible enough for...

item.title: From SDLC to AI-DLC: Coding Agents Are Only the Beginning
item.description: From SDLC to AI-DLC: Coding Agents Are Only the Beginning Part 1 of a five-part series on the AI-Driven Development Lifecycle Most engineering organizations have started using AI somewhere in the...

item.title: Supabase .NET DevLog #1
item.description: Welcome to the first entry of our weekly log for the Supabase .NET SDK! 🎉 Being still a new joiner in the company, I' still ramping up. I've been working on a plan to set up the direction of the...

item.title: How Does PDF Parsing Actually 'Read' a PDF?
item.description: A primer for developers - plus a look at what ComPDF AI is doing on this path If you search for 'PDF parsing' or 'PDF parser', you'll usually see a long list of tool names and a line of marketing...

item.title: Why Chat Alone Won't Cut It for Multi-Agent Orchestration
item.description: Everybody's talking about multi-agent systems these days. Open any demo and you'll see a chat window with multiple bots going back and forth, and that's supposed to pass for collaboration. It's...

item.title: Mininglamp Technology Officially Open-Sources Octo: A New-Generation Platform for Human-AI Agent Collaboration
item.description: Today, Mininglamp Technology officially releases Octo — the first open-source, trustworthy Agent collaboration network that pioneers a new paradigm for human-AI teamwork. Octo supports private...

item.title: Automating M-Pesa Rent Collection in Kenya: The Technical Architecture
item.description: M-Pesa handles over 90% of rent payments in Kenya. But most landlords still reconcile these payments manually — downloading statements, matching transactions to tenants line by line in Excel. We...

item.title: Secure Kubernetes Dashboard with Cloudflare Zero Trust Tunnel
item.description: Originally published on kuryzhev.cloud We found our Kubernetes Dashboard sitting on a NodePort, reachable from the internet, during a routine Shodan sweep we ran against our own IP ranges. No VPN...

item.title: iCagenda and Balbooa Forms Joomla Flaws Reportedly Exploited as Zero-Days
item.description: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has added two maximum-severity security flaws impacting iCagenda and Balbooa extensions for Joomla to its Known Exploited...

item.title: Lorde says Ray-Ban Meta AI glasses are ‘not sexy’
item.description: Lorde was performing at the Real Cool Festival in Madrid on Thursday and took some time during her set to speak out against AI glasses. While she didn't specify any brands in particular, it's...

item.title: Shall We Go On Sinning So That Grace May Increase? is hypnotic, healing, and hopeful
item.description: Matmos are an incredibly accomplished duo between their own solo records like the masterpiece A Chance to Cut Is a Chance to Cure and production classic Bjork records like Vespertine. But Drew...

item.title: Apple’s failed self-driving car program left a legacy of powerful AI chips
item.description: Apple's self-driving car program never really got off the ground, but it may have been what made the company's chips the powerful AI performers they are. Early in the development of the...

item.title: One of SteelSeries’ best gaming headsets is over $100 off
item.description: SteelSeries has the Arctis Nova Pro Wireless gaming headset on sale for $239.99 (currently between $300 and $350 at other retailers). The Xbox version that supports a host of other platforms...

item.title: How Philips Hue got the smart home right
item.description: The state of the smart home can be frustrating, because it is just so obvious how things ought to work. You should be able to control everything from everywhere. Your spaces should adapt to what...

item.title: Less is more with the Oura Ring 5
item.description: If you're reading an Oura Ring 5 review at The Verge, you likely fall into one of two camps: newcomers looking for a smartwatch alternative, or Oura users pondering an upgrade. In the case of the...

item.title: Blue Prince became a bonding — and learning — experience for my family
item.description: I've always been the gamer in the family. When my son was born nearly 11 years ago, gaming was one of the things I looked forward to sharing with him. Pulling up a chair next to me, he would watch...

item.title: The fight against AI data centers is just beginning
item.description: This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on the data center buildout, follow Emma Roth. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers'...

item.title: Scientists’ Side Hustle? Using AI and Quantum Computing to Generate New Peptides
item.description: Researchers cobbled together funding and time to show how quantum computing could aid in the development of drugs to help underserved populations and combat rare diseases.

item.title: After years of teasing, the viral Nopia synth is ‘basically finished’
item.description: After setting the music gear corner of the internet on fire back in 2023 with the first glimpse at the Nopia, creators Martin Grieco and Rocío Gal are almost ready to bring it to market. The duo...

item.title: Oregon’s Attorney General withdraws effort to delay Paramount and Warner Bros. merger
item.description: Oregon Attorney General Dan Rayfield had been seeking documents from Paramount related to its takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery. Rayfield also asked a state circuit court judge to delay the...

item.title: Compromised jscrambler 8.14.0 npm Release Drops Rust Infostealer During Install
item.description: The jscrambler npm package was compromised, and simply installing its 8.14.0 release runs an infostealer on your machine. Published on July 11, 2026, the malicious version carries a preinstall...

item.title: Hackers Weaponize Balochistan Police Portal in Multi-Group Espionage Campaigns
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of sustained cyber espionage activity against several Pakistani law enforcement organizations undertaken by suspected China- and India-aligned...

item.title: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
item.description: ChatGPT is hiring a dedicated product manager to build experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults, according to a job posting.

item.title: Critical Zimbra Flaw Could Let Crafted Emails Run Malicious Code in User Sessions
item.description: Zimbra is urging customers to apply updates to address a critical security vulnerability impacting the Classic Web Client that could result in arbitrary code execution. The vulnerability has been...

item.title: OpenAI’s Head of Safety Is Leaving the Company
item.description: Johannes Heidecke’s departure comes as OpenAI tries to further integrate its research and safety teams.

item.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
item.description: "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company said in a blog post. "We've heard the...

item.title: Friday Squid Blogging: “Squidbleed” Vulnerability
item.description: In a rare combined cybersecurity/squid post, a twenty-nine-year-old squid proxy bug can leak HTTP requests. As usual, you can also use this squid post to talk about the security stories in the...

item.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
item.description: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.
